claimText: A rural labourer is defined as one who does manual work in rural areas in agricultural and nonagricultural occupations in return for wages in cash or kind, or partly in cash and partly in kind.
evidenceExcerpt: A rural labourer is defined as one who does manual work in rural areas in agricultural and nonagricultural occupations in return for wages in cash or kind, or partly in cash and partly in kind.

claimText: The United Nations Development Programme (UNDP) and the Oxford Poverty and Human Initiative (OPHI) released the 2025 Global Multidimensional Poverty Index (MPI) report.
